text: Welcome aboard, @mentor_lina! As a mentor, you'll be guiding new members. Check out #mentor-resources to get started.
Welcome to the community, @newbie_kim! We're glad to have you. Feel free to introduce yourself in #introductions and ask questions anytime.
Welcome to the team, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Please check the #mod-guidelines channel to get started.
Welcome, @guide_sam! You're all set as an event helper. Head over to #event-planning to introduce yourself.
